issue_title: Circle elements are not editible via center marker if snappable is false
issue_body_preview:
Since Version 2.15.0 Circle-Elements are not editable via center marker if snappable is set to false globally or on the element.

Version 2.14.2 was still working - and 2.17.0 still has the bug.

Reproducable Example: https://jsfiddle.net/raodubt1/

Steps to reproduce:

1. Globally set snapp
test_description_zh: 在地图上绘制一个圆形元素，全局设置 snappable 为 false（或在该元素上单独设置 snappable: false），然后启用编辑模式，尝试通过拖拽圆形的中心标记来移动圆形位置。
expected_result_zh: 即使 snappable 设置为 false，拖拽圆形的中心标记时，圆形应能正常跟随移动并更新位置，编辑功能完全可用。
